tool_args.label: All-Electronic Open-Road Tolling at Henry Hudson Bridge
tool_args.raw_text: All-Electronic Tolling / Open-Road Tolling system at the Henry Hudson Bridge. Under the ORT system, cash is not accepted, and the flow of traffic is in an open highway environment.

payload.description: Cashless tolling system using on-board transponder (E-ZPass tag) or license plate image capture; cash not accepted, open highway traffic flow

evidence_refs.source_quote: All-Electronic Tolling / Open-Road Tolling system at the Henry Hudson Bridge
cash is not accepted, and the flow of traffic is in an open highway environment

tool_args.label: Revenue Recovery System for license plate enforcement
tool_args.raw_text: Automated Revenue Recovery System utilizing Optical Character Recognition technology, inference servers, and DMV wild card lookups to identify vehicles with unreadable license plate characters. System feeds information to roadside license plate readers to alert law enforcement.

payload.description: Automated system using OCR technology, inference servers, and DMV wild card lookups to identify vehicles with unreadable license plates due to malicious modification, wear and tear, collision damage; feeds roadside license plate readers to alert law enforcement

evidence_refs.source_quote: RRS will utilize Optical Character Recognition technology, inference servers, and Division of Motor Vehicle wild card lookups to identify vehicles with unreadable license plate characters
will feed information to roadside license plate readers to alert law enforcement personnel of altered and partially obstructed license plates

tool_args.label: RRS essential for toll evasion enforcement
tool_args.raw_text: B&T continues to research and implement new, innovative methods to combat toll evasion. The current manual review process for altered license plates is insufficient to address the scale and sophistication of revenue evasion tactics. Therefore, an automated RRS is essential to increase the probability of recovering tolls from such vehicle owners and stop the financial losses.

payload.claim_text: The current manual review process for altered license plates is insufficient to address the scale and sophistication of revenue evasion tactics. Therefore, an automated RRS is essential to increase the probability of recovering tolls from such vehicle owners and stop the financial losses.
payload.description: B&T states that an automated Revenue Recovery System is essential to combat toll evasion as manual review is insufficient to address scale of revenue evasion

evidence_refs.source_quote: The current manual review process for altered license plates is insufficient to address the scale and sophistication of revenue evasion tactics
